mapper.select: SELECT id, site_name, favicon_file_id, seo_title, seo_description, seo_keywords, company_address, company_phone, admin_email, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM site_config WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE site_config SET site_name = #{siteName}, favicon_file_id = #{faviconFileId}, seo_title = #{seoTitle}, seo_description = #{seoDescription}, seo_keywords = #{seoKeywords}, company_address = #{companyAddress}, company_phone = #{companyPhone}, admin_email = #{adminEmail}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO site_config ( id, site_name, favicon_file_id, seo_title, seo_description, seo_keywords, company_address, company_phone, admin_email, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{siteName}, #{faviconFileId}, #{seoTitle}, #{seoDescription}, #{seoKeywords}, #{companyAddress}, #{companyPhone}, #{adminEmail}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted} )
